title: Arbitrary manual live score reconciliation fall-through
problem: ticket-130 proved live contradiction detection for arbitrary manual_text sources. NM-4 pipeline still stops before score reconciliation; reconcile-scores uses checksum-pinned mock fixtures for synthnote and has no live fall-through for unmapped manual_text.
acceptance_criteria: After live extract through detect-contradictions on an unmapped manual_text source (or explicit no-contradiction result), explicit live mode can reconcile scores via Ollama on a follow-up source.
At least one validated score_events row persists to the gitignored evidence DB.
Checksum-pinned synthnote mock paths remain deterministic.
Golden tests remain mock-only and pass.
rollback_plan: Remove live score reconciliation fall-through flag; retain ticket-127–130 calibration.
